No Poverty.reason: The course syllabus provides no evidence, direct or indirect, linking to poverty eradication or related targets.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: A lesson topic '튼튼한 이를 유지하기 위해 지켜야 할 것' (Things to observe to maintain strong teeth) is mentioned. While oral health is part of well-being, the course's primary focus is language acquisition, making the link very tangential and minimal.
evidence: 튼튼한 이를 유지하기 위해 지켜야 할 것
